app.tagline: A private tool for understanding letters from Colorado Medicaid.
lang.label: Language
hero.title: Got a letter from Health First Colorado?
hero.body: Drop it in below. We will tell you what it says, what to do, and when. Your letter never leaves this device.
hero.privacy: No accounts. No tracking. No server. Everything happens in your browser.
drop.help: Accepts PDF, JPG, or PNG. Your file never leaves this device.
drop.aria: Drop a PDF or photo of your letter here, or press Enter to choose a file.
paste.label: Paste the words from your letter
paste.placeholder: Type or paste what the letter says…
result.heading: Here is what we found
result.lowConfidence: We are not fully sure what kind of letter this is. Please double-check with the letter itself, or call CCDC.
result.translationPending: This Spanish text is an early draft. It has not been checked yet by a person. When in doubt, call CCDC.
result.disclaimer: This tool gives information, not legal advice. It does not file anything for you. For help, call CCDC.
deadline.heading: Deadline
deadline.daysLeft: {days, plural, one {# day left} other {# days left}}
deadline.past: {days, plural, one {# day past} other {# days past}}
deadline.unknownTitle: Check the date on your letter
deadline.typicalWindow: Letters like this usually give about {days} days. Look for the date printed on your letter.
deadline.noWindow: Look for the date printed on your letter. If you are not sure, call CCDC.
deadline.estimateNote: We read this date from your letter. Always confirm it against the letter itself.
error.heading: We could not read that
error.encrypted: This PDF is locked with a password. Open it, remove the password, and save a new copy. Then try again.
error.invalidPdf: We could not open that PDF. It may be damaged. Try a photo of the letter instead.
error.emptyPdf: This PDF has no readable text. It may be a scan. Take a clear photo of the letter and upload that instead.
error.ocrEmpty: We could not read the words in that photo. Try again in better light, hold the camera steady, and fit the whole page in the picture.
error.unsupported: We can read PDFs and photos (JPG or PNG). That file type is not supported.
error.heic: iPhone photos saved as HEIC cannot be read here. On your iPhone, open Settings, then Camera, then Formats, and choose "Most Compatible." Take the photo again and try once more. Or upload the letter as a PDF.
error.generic: Something went wrong reading your letter. Please try again, or paste the text instead.
how.title: How it works
how.step1: Drop in a PDF or photo of your letter.
how.step2: We read it on your device. Nothing is uploaded.
how.step3: You see a plain-language summary, the deadline, and what to do next.
footer.builtWith: Built with the Colorado Cross-Disability Coalition. Open source.
footer.help: Need help right now? Call CCDC at {phone}.
theme.label: Colors
legal.draftNote: Draft for the demonstration period. Not yet reviewed by a lawyer.
consent.legalLinks: By continuing, you also agree to the {terms} and the {privacy}.
consent.title: Before you start
consent.demoNotice: This is a demonstration. It is an early version, shown for feedback. It is not yet a public service.
consent.intro: Please read this, then agree at the bottom.
consent.local: Private by design. Your letter and everything you type stay on this device. There is no server and no account. Nothing you open here is sent anywhere or kept after you close this tab.
consent.draft: Draft content. The guidance has not yet been reviewed by CCDC advocates, and the Spanish is awaiting review by a native speaker. A deadline or a step could be wrong.
consent.notAdvice: Not legal advice. This tool gives general information. It does not give legal or medical advice, and it does not file anything for you. Always confirm what it says against your letter, your county office, or CCDC.
consent.yourDocs: Your documents are your choice. You decide what to open here. Health information on your screen can be seen by people around you. On a shared or public computer, close this tab when you are done.
consent.noWarranty: No warranty. This free tool is provided as is. By continuing, you agree that the people and organizations who made it are not responsible for decisions you make based on it, or for any loss connected to using it.
consent.help: Questions, or need help right now? Call CCDC at {phone}.
examples.heading: Just looking? Try an example
examples.note: These sample letters are made up for demonstration. They are not about any real person.
